arts.ttl: Serie A | Bologna v Parma: Match Preview
arts.sum: As Serie A action resumes this weekend, Bologna welcomes newly-promoted Parma to Stadio Renato Dall’Ara for an intriguing Sunday afternoon clash. Both teams enter the match looking to bounce back from recent setbacks and climb the league table. Bologna, fresh off a midweek Champions League defeat at Liverpool, sits 13th in Serie A with just one win from their opening six matches. The Rossoblu have drawn all three of their home games so far this season by identical 1-1 scorelines. arts.ttl: Beukema shines for Bologna, attracting Premier League Interest and national team call-up
arts.sum: Bologna’s Dutch center-back Sam Beukema continues to impress with his performances, most recently in a convincing display against Liverpool at Anfield. Despite conceding goals to McAllister and Salah, Beukema’s performance caught the eye of Premier League scouts in attendance. La Gazzetta dello Sport report how the 25-year-old defender, who joined Bologna two summers ago from AZ Alkmaar for €7.5 million, has developed significantly under coach Thiago Motta. His growth has not gone unnoticed, with several European clubs already monitoring his progress since last season.
